subtitles.original: I cannot offer it. Wait, what else do we need?
subtitles.english: I cannot offer it. Wait, what else do we need?
We need to sell out.
We need to sell out.

subtitles.original: Ah... I'm so tired from all this thinking.
subtitles.english: Ah... I'm so tired from all this thinking.

subtitles.original: I think we need to explore other genres, Cecilia Immergreen.
subtitles.english: I think we need to explore other genres, Cecilia Immergreen.
Like what?
Every genre.

subtitles.original: I think that's the only way.
subtitles.english: I think that's the only way.
You're boring me... kind of.
What?
Oh, a sympathetic sleeper!
Oh...
Where... Where are we, Gigi?
What is this?

subtitles.original: Are we... Are we in my head? Wait, are we in your head?
subtitles.english: Are we... Are we in my head? Wait, are we in your head?
Are we in my head?
What?
This is just like fanfiction!
This is just like fanfiction!

subtitles.original: Does that mean we're going to steal people's ideas?
subtitles.english: Does that mean we're going to steal people's ideas?

subtitles.original: Oh no, they're our ideas. We're in my head.
subtitles.english: Oh no, they're our ideas. We're in my head.

subtitles.original: I'm going to steal your idea.
subtitles.english: I'm going to steal your idea.
You't can't steal my ideas.
I could!
Wait, what if... No.

subtitles.original: What if I see every single idea that's in your head and then I take them from you?
subtitles.english: What if I see every single idea that's in your head and then I take them from you?
Stop!

subtitles.original: Cecilia, if you go too deep into my brain, you'll get to the yaoi parts!
subtitles.english: Cecilia, if you go too deep into my brain, you'll get to the yaoi parts!
Oh. Oh.

subtitles.original: Maybe we should start with my brain. It's okay, it's okay.
subtitles.english: Maybe we should start with my brain. It's okay, it's okay.
Wait. Wait.
What's in your brain?
A thing.

subtitles.original: Actually, there's a lot in my brain. For example...
subtitles.english: Actually, there's a lot in my brain. For example...

subtitles.original: Your brain is full of bad romance novels! We can't put that in our show!
subtitles.english: Your brain is full of bad romance novels! We can't put that in our show!
Yes, we can!

subtitles.original: We can't put it in our show!
subtitles.english: We can't put it in our show!

subtitles.original: Let's put it in our show! Yeah, yeah, yeah!
subtitles.english: Let's put it in our show! Yeah, yeah, yeah!
Romance...
Romance.

subtitles.original: I guess we need to break free out of this place.
subtitles.english: I guess we need to break free out of this place.
[Title Card: DROPPED OUT OF SCHOOL MUSICAL]

subtitles.original: THE FOLLOWING SCENE IS AS FOLLOWS: CROY AND GIBRIELLA ARE AT A PARTY. CROY LOVES BASKETBALL AND GIBRIELLA IS NOT LIKE OTHER GIRLS...
subtitles.english: [Title: Croy and Gibriella are at a party. Croy loves basketball and Gibriella is not like other girls...]

subtitles.original: I don't want to sing. I'm just a normal boy.
subtitles.english: I don't want to sing. I'm just a normal boy.

subtitles.original: I just want to play basketball with my friends and get my head in the game. I can't sing!
subtitles.english: I just want to play basketball with my friends and get my head in the game. I can't sing!
I'm just Croy!

subtitles.original: Get it together, Gibriella! We don't have time for extracurriculars, we have to get into college!
subtitles.english: Get it together, Gibriella! We don't have time for extracurriculars, we have to get into college!

subtitles.original: I'm not like other girls, I just want to stay at home and read books!
subtitles.english: I'm not like other girls, I just want to stay at home and read books!

subtitles.original: ばかみたい 子供なのね
subtitles.english: Like a fool, I'm just a child, aren't I?
Chasing dreams and getting hurt
Even though you're bad at lying
You showed me a smile you couldn't laugh with

subtitles.original: I love youも ろくに言わない
subtitles.english: You wouldn't even say 'I love you' properly

subtitles.original: 口下手でほんまに不器用
subtitles.english: You're bad with words and truly clumsy

subtitles.original: なのにおなのにどうして
subtitles.english: Yet, yet, why
Could you say goodbye?

subtitles.original: だめだね だめよ だめなのよ
subtitles.english: It's no good, it's bad, it's just no good

subtitles.original: あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
subtitles.english: I love you so much, I love you too much

subtitles.original: どれだけ 強いお酒でも
subtitles.english: No matter how strong the alcohol is
The memories won't get distorted...
...like a fool.

subtitles.original: ばかみたい 本当バカね
subtitles.english: Like a fool, you're really a fool

subtitles.original: あんた信じるばかりで
subtitles.english: Always believing in you
Pretending to be a strong woman
Bathed in the night wind of heartache
